Event: The Quantum Adventure
Event Date: 01/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A157
Frozen Moment

Triggers: Once in a while

Titanic Blast
Causes a huge explosion that deals 200000 magic damage to all enemies. One of the following effects is triggered on enemies, based on the health remaining after the explosion:
- If the enemy has 30% or more health left, they are stunned for 1 sec.
- If the enemy has 30% or less health left, instead of being stunned, they are petrified for 1 sec. During this time, the enemy can't move and takes 35% more damage.
- If the target dies from the damage taken, it explodes, dealing 250000 magic damage to all enemies in a small radius around itself.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: Once in a while
